ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 显示 - 始终显示状态

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 隐藏 - 完全隐藏状态

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: darken - only make the status less visible
ast.target: 变暗 - 仅降低状态可见度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: choose which metric to use for typing speed
ast.target: 选择用于计算打字速度的指标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replicate the word counting functionality of MonkeyType by considering each word as the number of characters divided by 5. While this method may not be as precise for direct word counting, it accounts for the varying lengths of words.
ast.target: 通过将每个单词视为字符数除以5来复制MonkeyType的单词计数功能。虽然这种方法对于直接单词计数可能不够精确，但它考虑了单词长度的变化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Present the lowest and highest typing speeds observed, focusing specifically on the worst and best speeds recorded within 3-second intervals. Note that there is more numbers shifting per second so it may be more distracting
ast.target: 显示观察到的最低和最高打字速度，特别关注在3秒间隔内记录的最差和最佳速度。请注意，每秒数字变化更多，因此可能更分散注意力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you stop writing, after 3 seconds the typing speed display will darken or hide.
ast.target: 当你停止输入后，3秒后打字速度显示将变暗或隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tweak the ordering in the status bar, to try to put the typing speed at first. Generally used to avoid shifting issue when trying to hide the typing speed. (This is a hack and may create little visual issues with other plugin)
ast.target: 调整状态栏中的排序，尝试将打字速度放在首位。通常用于在尝试隐藏打字速度时避免移位问题。（这是一个hack，可能会与其他插件产生一些小的视觉问题）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示最小-最大打字速度
